title: Chronic Disease Self Management Programs * Diabetes - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Chronic Disease Self Management Programs * Diabetes 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Diabetes Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF EUGENE FAMILY YMCA YMCA'S DIABETES PREVENTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The YMCA's Diabetes Prevention Program is a year-long program consisting of 25 classroom sessions. A trained Lifestyle Coach helps participants learn strategies for healthy eating, physical activity, and other lifestyle changes. 600 E 24th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who are overweight with a BMI greater than or equal to 25 and diagnosed with prediabetes or at high risk for diabetes Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 686-9622 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE FAMILY YMCA YMCA'S DIABETES PREVENTION PROGRAM
